statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); branch=$(cd "$dir" 2>/dev/null && git -c core.fileMode=false config --global --add safe.directory "$dir" 2>/dev/null; git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); context_info=''; [ -n "$remaining" ] && context_info=" | Context: ${remaining}%"; git_info=''; [ -n "$branch" ] && git_info=" (${branch})"; echo "${dir}${git_info} | ${model}${context_info}"
